title: CANDY DREAM
description: Welcome to Candy Dream, the ultimate candy matching puzzle adventure! Dive into a world filled with delicious candies and embark on a sweet journey through various levels packed with fun and challenging puzzles. Match and collect different candies to progress through levels, achieve high scores, and unlock special power-ups. With its vibrant graphics and engaging gameplay, Candy Dream is perfect for players of all ages who love a sweet challenge.
instructions: How to Play Match 3 Candies Swap adjacent candies to match three or more of the same kind in a row or column Complete Objectives Each level has specific objectives such as reaching a certain score collecting particular candies or clearing obstacles
